name: Ghost
description: Modern open-source publishing platform for blogs, newsletters, and paid subscriptions

description.value: Modern open-source publishing platform for blogs, newsletters, and paid subscriptions

cms-type.comment: Traditional with Handlebars themes; also supports headless usage via Content API

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted open source or Ghost(Pro) managed service

database-support.comment: MySQL 8.0 is the officially supported database

api-type.comment: REST Content API (read-only) and Admin API (full CRUD); no GraphQL support

multi-tenancy.comment: Each Ghost installation serves a single site

static-site-generation.comment: Works as content source for Next.js, Gatsby, Nuxt, Eleventy and other SSGs via Content API

edge-deployment.comment: Ghost(Pro) includes CDN; self-hosted can be deployed behind CDN

content-types.comment: Fixed content types: Posts, Pages, Tags, Authors. No custom content type creation

custom-fields.comment: No custom fields; limited to built-in post metadata. Custom theme settings available for themes only

field-types.comment: Built-in fields: title, slug, featured image, excerpt, content (rich text), metadata

content-relationships.comment: Posts can be linked to Tags and Authors (many-to-many)

nested-components.comment: No reusable content components; editor supports cards/blocks but not reusable across posts

localization.comment: No native multi-language content support; theme UI can be translated but not content. Workarounds require third-party services like Weglot

content-validation.comment: No custom validation rules; only basic required field validation

embedded-interactives.comment: Editor supports embedded cards for galleries, video, audio, bookmarks, code blocks, and HTML embeds

content-versioning.comment: No built-in version history UI; revisions stored in database but not accessible through admin. On roadmap for future release

draft-publish.comment: Built-in draft and published states with separate views

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule posts for future publication with specific date and time

approval-workflows.comment: No multi-step approval workflows; Authors can publish directly

content-locking.comment: No content locking to prevent concurrent editing

audit-logging.comment: No built-in audit logging for content changes

media-library.comment: Built-in media management for images and files

image-transformations.comment: Automatic image resizing with responsive srcset generation

external-media-storage.comment: Can configure external storage adapters for S3 and other providers

video-support.comment: Native video upload in editor plus embed support for YouTube, Vimeo, etc.

svg-support.comment: SVG files can be uploaded as images

folder-organization.comment: No folder organization for media; images organized by upload date

role-based-access.comment: Five built-in roles: Contributor, Author, Editor, Administrator, Owner

granular-permissions.comment: Fixed role permissions; cannot customize per content-type or field-level

sso-saml.comment: No native SSO/SAML support for staff authentication; available only through third-party integrations. Enterprise tier has SSO via Magic Links

team-collaboration.comment: No built-in commenting, assignments, or notifications for editorial teams

audience-restrictions.comment: Native membership system with free and paid tiers; content can be restricted to specific member tiers

typescript-sdk.comment: Official JavaScript SDK (@tryghost/content-api) with TypeScript types

content-type-sdk.comment: No code-first content modeling; fixed content types

cli-tools.comment: Ghost CLI for installation, configuration, and updates; GScan for theme validation

local-development.comment: Full local development environment with ghost-cli

webhooks.comment: Webhooks for content events (publish post, new member, etc.)

plugin-system.comment: No plugin system; customization through themes and integrations only

admin-ui-customization.comment: Admin UI is not customizable; theme settings can be added for front-end only

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs with guides for developers, API reference, theme development, and hosting; well-organized and regularly updated

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official guides for Next.js, Nuxt, Gatsby, Hexo, VuePress, Gridsome, Eleventy

search-integration.comment: Built-in native search; supports integration with external search providers

preview-mode.comment: Live preview for desktop, mobile, email, and social; can preview as public, free member, or paid member

ecommerce-integration.comment: Native Stripe integration for paid subscriptions; integrations with Shopify, Snipcart, Gumroad, PayPal

analytics-integration.comment: Built-in engagement analytics for members and content; integrations with Google Analytics, Plausible, Fathom, etc.

ai-features.comment: No native AI features; can integrate with AI tools via Zapier or custom code

cdn-included.comment: Ghost(Pro) includes global CDN; self-hosted requires separate CDN setup

rate-limits.comment: No rate limits documented for Content API; self-hosted has no restrictions

global-regions.comment: Ghost(Pro) Enterprise tier includes dedicated IP and global CDN

free-tier.comment: Open source self-hosted is free; Ghost(Pro) requires paid subscription (starts at $18/mo)

open-source.comment: MIT licensed open source; 100% user-funded, no investors

pricing-model.comment: Self-hosted is free; Ghost(Pro) tiers based on member count and staff users ($18-$199/mo, custom enterprise)

commercial-support.comment: Priority support on Business tier; custom enterprise support available

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise tier includes dedicated IP, 99.9% uptime SLA, unlimited staff/members, SSO
